allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host ''restarting''")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name powershell -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name cmd -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host done")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 38044 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { \\$_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(cmd /c "netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=\\"Node 3001\\" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3001")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''outputPath:'''', d.get\(''''outputPath''''\)\); print\(''''locale:'''', d.get\(''''locale''''\)\); print\(''''deps:'''', d.get\(''''dependencies''''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''outputPath:'''', d.get\(''''outputPath''''\)\); print\(''''locale:'''', d.get\(''''locale''''\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('cmd','powershell','WindowsTerminal'\) } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); findings=[f for f in d[''''findings''''] if f[''''severity''''] in \(''''Critical'''',''''Warning''''\)]; print\(f''''{len\(findings\)} issues remaining''''\); [print\(f[''''id''''], f[''''severity''''], f[''''summary'''']\) for f in findings]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''outputPath:'''', d.get\(''''outputPath''''\)\); print\(''''locale:'''', d.get\(''''locale''''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; services=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['service']['id'], s['service']['name']\) for s in services]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k\) for k in ['buildCommand','devCommand','outputDirectory','builds','env']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['service']['id'], s['service']['name']\) for s in d]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); findings=[f for f in d['findings'] if f['severity'] in \('Critical','Warning'\)]; print\(f'Findings: {len\(findings\)}'\); [print\(f['id'], f['severity'], f['summary'][:80]\) for f in findings]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('state:', d['state']\); print\('complete:', d['progress']['complete'], '/', d['progress']['total']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); findings=[f for f in d['findings'] if f['severity'] in \('Critical','Warning'\)]; print\(json.dumps\(findings\)\)")
